zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Mortimer於1459年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏斯特拉特費爾德 莫特時，她的父親Sir Hugh de Mortimer Lord of Kyre and Martley46歲，母親Jane Hebert31歲。她於大約1478年與Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1502年6月29日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Mortimer于1459年出生在英国英格兰波克夏斯特拉特費爾德 莫特时，她的父亲Sir Hugh de Mortimer Lord of Kyre and Martley46岁，母亲Jane Hebert31岁。她于大约1478年与Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1502年6月29日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Mortimer was born in 1459, in Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Hugh de Mortimer Lord of Kyre and Martley, was 46 and her mother, Jane Hebert, was 31. She married Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre about 1478, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 29 June 1502, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Mortimer est née en 1459, à Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh de Mortimer Lord of Kyre and Martley, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Jane Hebert, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre environ 1478, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 juin 1502, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Stratfield Mortimer, Hampshire, England: Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Mortimer 1459 in Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh de Mortimer Lord of Kyre and Martley 46 und ihre Mutter Jane Hebert 31. Sie hat um 1478 in England Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Juni 1502 im Alter von 43 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Mortimer è nata il nel 1459 nel Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Hugh de Mortimer Lord of Kyre and Martley, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Jane Hebert, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre circa 1478, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 29 giugno 1502, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Mortimerが1459年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアストラトフィールド モーティマーで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh de Mortimer Lord of Kyre and Martleyは46歳，母Jane Hebertは31歳であった。約1478年にイギリスでThomas West 8th Baron de La Warreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1502年6月29日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Mortimer(이)가 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 스트라트필드 모르팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh de Mortimer Lord of Kyre and Martley(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Hebert(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1478년 영국에서 Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1502년 6월 29일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Mortimer nasceu em 1459, em Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hugh de Mortimer Lord of Kyre and Martley, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Jane Hebert, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre aproximadamente 1478, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de junho de 1502, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Mortimer родилась в 1459 г. в местности стратфиелд мортимир, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh de Mortimer Lord of Kyre and Martley было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Hebert, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas West 8th Baron de La Warre около 1478 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 29 июня 1502 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.
